analysis.name: Elsa
analysis.summary: ELSA近期因Bithumb、Coinbase等交易所上线及Binance期货合约推出而获得关注，但价格自ATH下跌89%，30日跌幅31%，当前市值约991万美元，流动性充足。项目为AI驱动的链上执行平台，基本面扎实，但代币全稀释估值较高，且近期无重大新催化，短期上涨动力不足。

recommendation.invalidation: 若出现新的交易所上线或产品重大更新，可重新评估。

latestNews.reason: Coinbase上线提升项目可信度和用户基础。

latestNews.reason: 衍生品上线增加交易工具和投机需求。

latestNews.title: HeyElsa Drama Finally Over: Airdrop Settled, Biconomy Listing Live
latestNews.reason: 空投纠纷解决，但市场已消化。

fundamentals: HeyElsa是AI驱动的链上执行平台，支持自然语言交互执行DeFi操作。
项目覆盖Mantle、Base等生态，定位DeFAI赛道。
代币总供应量10亿，流通量2.29亿，流通率22.9%。
全稀释估值约4330万美元，当前市值约991万美元。
marketRead: 24小时涨幅3.6%，但30日跌幅31%，处于下跌趋势。
DEX流动性约3374万美元，深度良好。
成交量约451万美元，相对市值活跃度一般。
价格自ATH 0.4美元下跌89%，当前0.043美元。
risks: 代币全稀释估值较高，大量未解锁代币可能带来抛压。
近期无重大新催化，利好已兑现。
AI赛道竞争激烈，项目需持续迭代。
价格处于长期下跌通道，动量偏空。
watchlist: 是否有新的CEX上线或做市商合作
整体市场情绪和AI板块表现
sourceNotes: 新闻时间集中在2026年1月，距今已5个月，时效性不足。
DEX价格与CEX价格可能存在差异，此处使用DEX价格。
市场数据来自DexScreener，可能不包含所有交易量。

profile.name: Elsa
profile.description: HeyElsa is an AI-powered on-chain execution platform designed to simplify how users and applications interact with crypto and decentralized finance. The platform converts user intent, expressed through natural language or structured inputs, into deterministic on-chain actions such as swaps, bridging, staking, yield optimization, and automated portfolio execution across multiple blockchain networks and protocols. HeyElsa operates through both a consumer-facing AI Copilot and a business-to-business infrastructure offering, including widgets, SDKs, and agent execution APIs that can be embedded into wallets and applications. The core purpose of the project is to abstract fragmented DeFi interfaces and execution complexity, while maintaining transparency, security, and user control. HeyElsa focuses on real usage, automation, and reliable execution rather than speculative features, aiming to make crypto transactions seamless and operationally efficient.
